name: Challah- (Holiday Twist Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast and sugar in the warm water (110-115 degrees). Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the flours and salt. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture. Add the egg, oil, yeast mixture, and remaining 1-1/4 cups of water. Mix well.
3. Knead the dough on a floured board, adding more whole wheat flour until the dough is smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in an oiled bowl. Cover with a damp towel and let rise until doubled, about 1 hour.
5. Divide the dough into three parts. Roll each third into a strip about 15 inches long.
6. Braid the strips together and place on a lightly-oiled baking sheet. Brush with beaten egg.
7. Sprinkle poppy seeds over the dough. Cover and let rise until doubled.
8. Bake in a 375-degree oven for 40 to 45 minutes, or until golden brown.
